title: California judge dismisses criminal charges against PG&E in deadly 2020 wildfire
text: REDDING, Calif. — A California judge on Wednesday dismissed all charges against Pacific Gas & Electric in connection to a 2020 fatal wildfire sparked by its equipment that destroyed hundreds of homes and killed four people, including an 8-year-old child.

title: Pacific Gas and Electric to pay $50 million to settle 2020 Zogg wildfire charges
text: A unit of utility firm PG&E Corp said on Wednesday that it would pay $50 million to settle certain charges related to the deadly Zogg wildfires of 2020.

title: PG&E Corporation to Hold 2023 Investor Day
text: OAKLAND, Calif. , May 22, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- PG&E Corporation (NYSE: PCG) will hold an Investor Day on Wednesday, May 24, 2023, including a virtual webcast at 6:30 p.m.

title: PG&E: Industry-Leading EPS Growth, Dividend Likely On The Way, Reiterate Buy
text: The Utilities sector P/E has fallen slightly lately, but the group remains valued about 17 times next-12-month EPS. I continue to have a favorable outlook on PCG shares given its bottom-line growth trajectory and likely dividend reinstatement later this year.

title: PG&E Corporation (PCG) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: PG&E Corporation (NYSE:PCG ) Q1 2023 Earnings Conference Call May 4, 2023 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Jonathan Arnold - VP, IR Patricia Poppe - CEO & Director Chris Foster - EVP & CFO Carolyn Burke - EVP Finance, Incoming CFO Conference Call Participants Steven Fleishman - Wolfe Research Shahriar Pourreza - Guggenheim Securities Julien Dumoulin-Smith - Bank of America Anthony Crowdell - Mizuho Securities Ryan Levine - Citigroup Operator Good morning. My name is Audra, and I will be your conference operator today.

title: PG&E Corp. (PCG) Meets Q1 Earnings, Reaffirms 2023 View
text: PG&E Corp.'s (PCG) first-quarter adjusted EPS of 29 cents is in line with the Zacks Consensus Estimate.

title: PG&E (PCG) Matches Q1 Earnings Estimates
text: PG&E (PCG) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.29 per share, in line with the Zacks Consensus Estimate. This compares to earnings of $0.30 per share a year ago.

title: PG&E Corporation Reports First-Quarter Results; On Track to Deliver Solid 2023
text: Recorded GAAP earnings were $0.27 per diluted share for the first quarter of 2023, compared to earnings of $0.22 per diluted share for the same period in 2022. Non-GAAP core earnings were $0.29 per diluted share for the first quarter of 2023, compared to earnings of $0.30 per diluted share for the same period in 2022.
